_provenance.event: Merger by absorption (devralma yoluyla birleşme) into Türkiye Şişe ve Cam Fabrikaları A.Ş. (SISE); Borsa İstanbul delisting

sources.what: Borsa İstanbul A.Ş. announcement of last trading day & delisting
sources.quote: Anadolu Cam, Denizli Cam, Soda Sanayi ve Trakya Cam payları Borsamızda en son 30/09/2020 tarihinde işlem görmüş olacaktır... 01/10/2020 tarihinden itibaren Kotasyon Yönergesinin 23/1-ç maddesi kapsamında kottan çıkarılacak

_provenance.valid_from_note: valid_from=2020-01-30 is the merger public-announcement date, used as a SOURCED LOWER BOUND for SODA's listing membership in this slice. SODA's true first-listing/IPO date predates it but could not be cleanly sourced for the delisted entity (data vendors surface the unrelated SODSN / Sodaş Sodyum). Backfilling the true IPO date is a later refinement; no assertion in the survivorship test depends on this bound — all checks sit inside the airtight 2020-06..2020-10 sourced window.
_provenance.bitemporal_model: Two rows. (1) Open membership as KNOWN at the merger announcement (valid_to NULL, knowledge_date 2020-01-30) — in mid-2020 the market did not yet know SODA would delist. (2) The delisting correction as KNOWN at the Borsa İstanbul announcement (valid_to 2020-09-30, knowledge_date 2020-09-18). PITAccess.universe resolves the latest correction known by as_of per (symbol, valid_from) span.
